messages.content: 附件是贵司包装供应商关于44ECT的第一次测试报告，贵司的包装供应商通过了此次测试。另外，请帮忙确认Fujian Wensong Printing Co. Ltd是否为福建省文松彩印有限公司的英文名称，谢谢！ 帮我优化句子

Attached is the first test report on 44ECT from your packaging supplier, who has passed the test. Additionally, please confirm if Fujian Wensong Printing Co. Ltd is the English name for Fujian Wensong Color Printing Co. Ltd. Thank you for your assistance in this matter.
我是说优化中文的句子
附上了贵司包装供应商关于44ECT的第一次测试报告，他们已经通过了此次测试。此外，请您确认福建文松彩印有限公司的英文名称是否为Fujian Wensong Printing Co. Ltd。感谢您的帮助。
附件为贵司包装供应商关于44ECT的第一次测试报告，已经通过了此次测试。另外，请帮忙确认Fujian Wensong Printing Co. Ltd是否为福建省文松彩印有限公司的英文名称，谢谢！ 帮我优化句子，是句子更流畅
贵司的包装供应商已经通过了关于44ECT的第一次测试报告，附件中有相应的测试报告。另外，请您确认福建省文松彩印有限公司的英文名称是否为Fujian Wensong Printing Co. Ltd。感谢您的帮助！
请看附件到目前为止培训的出席情况以及普通话培训在LMS上观看的情况。JP Grobal 是因为他们工厂停电了，她表示她想在LMS上观看培训的录制视频；Impress表示他们由于外出无法参加，我们是要给他们安排培训还是建议他们在LMS上观看。shungshun的话，将由您给他们培训。根据以上这些话发英语邮件给tim.

Dear Tim,

Please find attached the attendance records for the training sessions held thus far, as well as the status of Mandarin training watched on LMS (Learning Management System). Regarding JP Global, due to power outages at their factory, they were unable to attend the training session and have requested to watch the training video on LMS. As for Impress, they were unable to attend the training due to being out of the office. We would like to know whether we should arrange another training session for them or suggest that they watch the video on LMS. Finally, as for Shungshun, we would like you to conduct the training session for them.

Thank you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
请看下面到目前为止培训的出席情况以及普通话培训在LMS上观看的情况。JP Grobal 是因为他们工厂停电了，她表示她想在LMS上观看培训的录制视频；Impress表示他们由于外出无法参加，我们是要给他们安排培训还是建议他们在LMS上观看。shungshun的话，将由您给他们培训。根据以上这些话发英语邮件给tim.

Dear Tim,

I hope this finds you well. I wanted to reach out regarding the attendance records for our training sessions thus far, as well as an update on the status of the Mandarin training available to watch on LMS (Learning Management System). 

Unfortunately, JP Global was unable to attend the training due to a factory-wide power outage. They have requested to watch the recording of the training on LMS instead. Impress has also been unable to attend due to being out of the office, and we would like your advice on whether we should arrange another training session for them or suggest that they watch the video on LMS. 

As for Shungshun, we would like you to conduct the training session for them at your earliest convenience. 

Please let us know if you have any questions or concerns. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
进入会议太慢了的英文怎么说
"Joining the meeting is taking too long" 或者 "We are experiencing delays in joining the meeting".
太晚进入会议了，英文怎么说
"We joined the meeting too late" 或者 "We entered the meeting too late".
有五家供应商需要在LMS上观看培训录制视频，现在有一家完成了。英语
Five suppliers are required to watch the training recording on LMS, and one supplier has completed it.
The login cardinals will send you later. Thank you. 有语法错误吗?
该句子有一处语法错误。正确的句子应该是：The login credentials will be sent to you later.
是什么意思
这个句子的意思是：您将会在稍后收到登录凭据。
